some years are better than others. these tend to be early harvest. short trees; easy to harvest from the ground. it's not public property at all, but i've gotten only weird looks. go during open hours so you're not totally trespassing. bring a 5 gallon bucket
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

there are several apple trees in front of the school. it's easy to pick up drops. some of the trees are easy to climb. go on a weekend. bring 5 gallon buckets. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-November.

as you drive in from rte 7, on the steep hills to your right. lots of shrubs. bring a bucket. harvest varies year-to-year. it's not really public. i imagine the mall owns the land. just don't park in the street. Take cuttings, they are easy to root. Access: Pu
